The '''Black Heth''' were a common [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] street gang that the [[Jin'ha]] used as a front in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. According to [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], the Black Heth were considered petty criminals, and were known to terrorize innocent civilians around [[Elcor Station]].

==History==
The Black Heth was a violent criminal gang on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="OW guide">[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Obi-Wan'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> Several [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] prior<ref name="SW:OW" /> to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="NEC date">The encounters with the Black Heth take place prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> while still training under [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] was [[Skirmishes on Coruscant|dispatched]] as part of his ongoing training to gather information regarding the increase of gang activity in Coruscant's [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|underlevels]]. He tracked a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Unidentified Trandoshan (Black Heth)|leader]] of the Black Heth to a [[Hovertrain/Legends|hovertrain]] in [[Elcor Station]] where he defeated the gangster. Afterward, Kenobi was sent to rescue an undercover [[Unidentified Quarren informant|informant]] inside the criminal organization. Kenobi worked his way down from atop an unfinished building until he reached the level where the informant was being kept. Though he was swarmed by thugs of varying [[Species/Legends|species]], ([[Gran/Legends|Gran]], [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]], [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]], and even [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]]) he was ultimately victorious. Afterward, the informant revealed that the Black Heth were in league with another group known as the [[Jin'ha]], who were encouraging the gangs of Coruscant to violence, hoping that it would prove a distraction to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. When Kenobi went to the location where the Black Heth were receiving weapons from the Jin'ha, he was attacked by group of Black Heth gang members. After defeating them, he was attacked by Jin'ha warriors, whom he also defeated.<ref name="SW:OW" /> Kenobi also encountered [[E4 baron droid]]s during the investigation.<ref name="NED">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Black Heth appears in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]], [[Star Wars: Obi-Wan (video game)|''Star Wars: Obi-Wan'']].
